summary: Fixes transaction safety, write serialization, binary cache handling, FTS query escaping, watch persistence reporting, drift output, and history bucketing.
reason: Human review found behavioral failures that machine gates missed, including partial sitemap commits, bypassed SQLite write locking, and user-input/runtime edge cases.
validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass with GOCACHE=/tmp/blu-ray-pp-cli-gocache; go test ./internal/cli ./internal/store and manual local search/drift/history checks pass.
